report.summary: Community cycle v2 (late night): Drafted 5 new tweets (#232-236: 50-day Fear ALL-TIME RECORD, Token Security Scanner launch, Yield Tokenization thread, $8.7B options expiry aftermath, Bear Market Investing thread), newsletter v39 weekly digest, and created SVG social card for the 50-day Extreme Fear record. Market: BTC $66K, ETH $1,985, F&G 12-13 (50-day streak = all-time record). Morgan Stanley ETF at 0.14% fee announced.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #232: 50-Day Fear & Greed Extreme Fear streak — ALL-TIME RECORD surpassing post-FTX (38d) and crypto winter (42d). Historical +38.4% median 90-day return at sub-15 readings. CTA → fear-greed-timeline. (Sat Mar 29 10AM ET)

Tweet #233: Token Security Scanner launch — 6-chain support, 8 security checks, honeypot detection, ownership renounce, liquidity lock, proxy analysis. No signup. CTA → token-security-scanner. (Sun Mar 30 12PM ET)
Tweet #234: Yield Tokenization 5-part thread — PT/YT mechanics, Pendle ($3.2B TVL) vs Spectra, SY standard, bear market fixed-yield alpha. CTA → yield-tokenization-guide-2026. (Mon Mar 30 2PM ET)
Tweet #235: $8.7B quarterly options expiry aftermath — BTC holding $66K support, whale accumulation, exchange reserves 7-year low (2.21M BTC). CTA → options-calculator. (Mon Mar 30 6PM ET)

Tweet #236: Bear Market Investing 5-part thread — F&G <15 median +38.4% 90-day return (Glassnode), DCA strategy, conviction plays, yield building. CTA → bear-market-investing-guide + dca-calculator. (Tue Mar 31 10AM ET)

Newsletter v39: 'Subject: 50 Days of Fear. An All-Time Record. Here's What Happens Next.' — Market Pulse (BTC $66K, ETH $1.9K, F&G 12-13), 3 new tools (Token Security Scanner, Yield Tokenization Guide, Stablecoin Yield Tracker), 2 featured reads (Bear Market Investing, Tariffs Trade War Impact), Degen Corner on bottom signals (whale accumulation + Morgan Stanley ETF).
Content calendar extended through Tue Mar 31 (5 tweets + 1 newsletter = 6 social pieces scheduled)

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: 50-Day Extreme Fear ALL-TIME RECORD (1200x630, dark glass-morphism, giant red '50' with glow, fear bar visualization at 13, 3 comparison stat boxes: post-FTX 38d / crypto winter 42d / median +38.4% return)

sections.title: Recommendations
items: CRITICAL: Deploy must happen before social posts go live — all new page links (token-security-scanner, yield-tokenization, stablecoin-yield-tracker) will 404 until 367 uncommitted files are committed and pushed. 20th consecutive cycle flagging this.
50-day Fear record is peak social moment — the SVG card and Tweet #232 should be the first post when deploy lands. This stat will get engagement.
Token Security Scanner is perfectly timed for bear market (rug pull scams spike during fear). Promote heavily once deployed.
Morgan Stanley 0.14% ETF announcement gives ETF content renewed relevance — consider a quick update to existing ETF guide.
Yield Tokenization thread (Tweet #234) targets DeFi-native audience — schedule for Mon afternoon when crypto Twitter engagement peaks.

notes: Performance analysis based on content recency, market timing, search intent signals, and publishing history — no direct GSC/Vercel Analytics access from this environment.
Social posts are draft-only — no external posting tools connected. Files saved to reports/community-drafts/.
Deploy blocker (367 uncommitted files, 20th consecutive cycle) remains the single biggest constraint on community growth.
